channel.title: NPR Topics: Culture
channel.description: Art and entertainment commentary plus interviews, book reviews, movie reviews, music reviews, comedy, and visual art. Subscribe to podcasts and follow trends in music, painting, art, architecture, photography, and design.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: A driver lifted a teen's spirits at a stoplight
item.description: Forty years ago, a 19-year-old woman sat behind the wheel of her car, sobbing and feeling like her life had fallen apart. A stranger pulled up beside her at a stoplight and lifted her spirits.
item.content:encoded: Forty years ago, a 19-year-old woman sat behind the wheel of her car, sobbing and feeling like her life had fallen apart. A stranger pulled up beside her at a stoplight and lifted her spirits.

item.title: How a stereo-mic captured unknown bands and delightful sound
item.description: NPR's Ailsa Chang talks with Aadam Jacobs about his massive archive of taped concert recordings from the 1980s and 1990s, and the grassroots effort to get them digitized.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Ailsa Chang talks with Aadam Jacobs about his massive archive of taped concert recordings from the 1980s and 1990s, and the grassroots effort to get them digitized.
item.dc:creator: Jordan-Marie Smith

item.title: Melania Trump wants ABC to 'take a stand' against Jimmy Kimmel after 'hateful' joke
item.description: Two days before the White House Correspondents' Dinner ended in gunfire, Kimmel delivered a mock Correspondents' Dinner speech during a sketch on his show. The first lady said it was "corrosive."
item.content:encoded:
Two days before the White House Correspondents' Dinner ended in gunfire, Kimmel delivered a mock Correspondents' Dinner speech during a sketch on his show. The first lady said it was "corrosive."

(Image credit: Mandel Ngan)
item.dc:creator: Mandalit del Barco

item.title: 'I love transforming': Nick Offerman goes from Pawnee to pro wrestler
item.description: Best known for his role as Ron Swanson on Parks and Recreation, Offerman plays a former professional wrestler reconnecting with his estranged daughter in Margo's Got Money Troubles.
item.content:encoded:
'/>

Best known for his role as Ron Swanson on Parks and Recreation, Offerman plays a former professional wrestler reconnecting with his estranged daughter in Margo's Got Money Troubles.
item.dc:creator: Ann Marie Baldonado

item.title: An off-beat family makes some 'Big Mistakes' in this clever crime farce
item.description: A new Netflix comedy series by and starring Dan Levy is a wild inversion of Schitt's Creek. Where that show started out cartoonish and grew warmer, Big Mistakes is a frolic that grows more hellish.
item.content:encoded:
A new Netflix comedy series by and starring Dan Levy is a wild inversion of Schitt's Creek. Where that show started out cartoonish and grew warmer, Big Mistakes is a frolic that grows more hellish.

(Image credit: Spencer Pazer)
item.dc:creator: John Powers

item.title: Sunday Puzzle: Blank to blank
item.description: NPR's Ayesha Rascoe plays the puzzle with WPLN listener Nancy Bieschke and Weekend Edition Puzzlemaster Will Shortz.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Ayesha Rascoe plays the puzzle with WPLN listener Nancy Bieschke and Weekend Edition Puzzlemaster Will Shortz.
item.dc:creator: Will Shortz

item.title: A little boy loses his orange 'Balloon' but gains a new friend in this kids' book
item.description: When author Bruce Handy's son was young, he loved and lost an orange balloon. He and illustrator Julie Kwon talk about a child's singular devotion to a lost object in their nearly wordless kids' book.
item.content:encoded: When author Bruce Handy's son was young, he loved and lost an orange balloon. He and illustrator Julie Kwon talk about a child's singular devotion to a lost object in their nearly wordless kids' book.
item.dc:creator: Samantha Balaban

item.title: World Press Photo Contest winners cast a lens on resilience, pain and bliss
item.description: A selection of prize honorees from the 2026 World Press Photo Contest capture the pain of the past year — but also focus on moments of strength, determination and joy.
item.content:encoded:
A selection of prize honorees from the 2026 World Press Photo Contest capture the pain of the past year — but also focus on moments of strength, determination and joy.

(Image credit: Ihsaan Haffejee for GroundUp)
item.dc:creator: Kamala Thiagarajan

item.title: Worldwide Pinhole Photography Day
item.description: Fine art photographer Nancy Breslin joins NPR's Scott Simon in studio to celebrate Worldwide Pinhole Photography Day.
item.content:encoded:
Fine art photographer Nancy Breslin joins NPR's Scott Simon in studio to celebrate Worldwide Pinhole Photography Day.

(Image credit: Nancy Breslin)
item.dc:creator: Scott Simon

item.title: New museum dedicated to AI promises an ethical approach
item.description: As some continue to pushback on AI art, artist Refik Anadol seeks to base his new venture on ethical and environmental principles.
item.content:encoded:
Machine Dreams: Rainforest, the inaugural exhibition at Dataland. The museum dedicated to AI art is scheduled to open on June 20.'/>

As some continue to pushback on AI art, artist Refik Anadol seeks to base his new venture on ethical and environmental principles.

(Image credit: Refik Anadol/Dataland)
item.dc:creator: Chloe Veltman
